reduce-fillers.label: Reduce Fillers
reduce-fillers.description: Lower your overall filler count first to build cleaner delivery.
reduce-fillers.coachHint: Watch total fillers and the top item in the ranking first.

steady-speed.label: Steady Pace
steady-speed.description: Keep most of your speaking pace inside the recommended range.
steady-speed.coachHint: Focus on out-of-range pace points and stabilize rhythm first.

cut-top-filler.label: Cut the Top Habit
cut-top-filler.description: Pick the most repeated filler and push it down into a controllable range.
cut-top-filler.coachHint: Fixing one repeated habit first is more effective than fixing everything at once.

steadySpeed.successStatus: Most pace points stayed within {{low}}–{{high}} wpm.
steadySpeed.failureStatus: There are still {{count}} out-of-range pace points, so the rhythm is not stable yet.
steadySpeed.nextFast: Start with the fast segments and leave a little space at the end of each sentence.
steadySpeed.nextSlow: Push the slower segments forward a bit so the sentence ending does not drag.

cutTopFiller.successStatus: “{{word}}” is already within a controllable range.
cutTopFiller.failureStatus: “{{word}}” is still too noticeable, so it should be your first fix.
cutTopFiller.noneStatus: No single filler stands out this time. Control looks solid.
cutTopFiller.nextWithWord: Click “{{word}}” in the ranking next and re-record those spots first.
cutTopFiller.nextWithoutWord: You can switch to a harder goal next, such as stabilizing pace.

reduceFillers.successStatus: Your total filler count stayed inside the target for this session.
reduceFillers.failureStatus: Fillers are still a bit high. You are {{difference}} over the current target.
reduceFillers.nextWithWord: Start by pushing down “{{word}}” first for the quickest gain.
reduceFillers.nextWithoutWord: Keep the current rhythm next round and clean up sentence endings.

interview-intro.label: Interview Intro
interview-intro.description: Slow down a bit and speak clearly. Prioritize filler sounds, habitual openings, and confirmation endings.

project-presentation.label: Project Presentation
project-presentation.description: Closest to a full presentation scenario, balancing transitions, pace stability, and filler control.

demo-pitch.label: Demo Pitch
demo-pitch.description: The pace can be sharper, but transition fillers such as “and then” and vague placeholders should stay under control.

retryPractice.fillerPrompt: Repeat this part without saying “{{word}}”, and finish the sentence cleanly in one pass.
retryPractice.slowPrompt: Make this segment more concise and try to stay within {{low}}–{{high}} wpm.
retryPractice.fastPrompt: Slow this segment down and leave a small beat at the end of each sentence to get back into {{low}}–{{high}} wpm.

notices.demoNoMic: Demo mode active. No microphone needed.
notices.prototypeNoCapture: Prototype mode. No real audio is captured.

countdown.title: Get ready
countdown.subtitle: Take a breath and get ready to speak.

analysis.title: Preparing this session report
analysis.body: Pace, fillers, and transcript details are being condensed into the next report view.
analysis.retryBody: This compares the retry against the original issue before showing the updated feedback.

postStop.title: This recording is ready
postStop.body: You can open the full report now, or retry the highest-priority issue right away while it is still fresh.
postStop.viewReportBody: Jump straight into the analysis, charts, transcript, and coaching tips.
postStop.retryBody: Practice “{{issue}}” again first so you can correct it while the context is still fresh.
postStop.retryDisabled: There is no clear retry target for this round yet.

preflight.title: Confirm this round first
preflight.body: Check the goal, preset, and recommended pace once before you begin.
preflight.retryBody: This run will jump straight into retrying the problem segment. Confirm the goal and pace before you start.

focusMode.helper: Focus mode keeps only the most important feedback on screen for this round.

transcript.title: Live Transcript
transcript.emptyIdle: Speech will appear here after you start talking…
transcript.emptyRetry: Say this segment again and focus only on fixing the target issue…
transcript.emptyPrototype: This is a prototype page, so microphone input is not actually transcribed here.

exitConfirm.title: Stop recording?
exitConfirm.body: You are still recording. If you go to “{{screen}}”, this session will stop immediately and no report will be generated.
